    Index

    A B C D E F G H I J L M O P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    AimComponent - Class in lucis.lux.hff.components
    The AimComponent class represents the aiming state of an entity, such as a player.
    AimComponent() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.components.AimComponent
    Constructs a new AimComponent with the default aiming state set to false.
    AimComponent(boolean) - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.components.AimComponent
    Constructs a new AimComponent with the specified aiming state.
    AimHUD - Class in lucis.lux.hff.ui
    The AimHUD class represents a custom HUD (Heads-Up Display) for aiming in the HFF plugin.
    AimHUD(PlayerRef) - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.ui.AimHUD
    Constructs a new AimHUD for the specified player.
    AimSystem - Class in lucis.lux.hff.systems
    The AimSystem class is an EntityTickingSystem responsible for managing the aiming mechanics of entities that have an AimComponent.
    AimSystem(ComponentType) - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.systems.AimSystem
    Constructs a new AimSystem with the specified component type for aiming.
    AmmoData - Record Class in lucis.lux.hff.data
    The AmmoData record represents the data associated with the type of ammunition.
    AmmoData(String, String, float) - Constructor for record class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoData
    Creates an instance of a AmmoData record class.
    AmmoData.Builder - Class in lucis.lux.hff.data
    The Builder class provides a fluent interface for constructing AmmoData objects.
    AmmoRegistry - Class in lucis.lux.hff.data
    The AmmoRegistry class serves as a central registry for managing and retrieving ammunition data associated with specific item IDs.
    AmmoRegistry() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoRegistry
     
    ASSAULT_RIFLE - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    Select-fire rifles chambered for intermediate cartridges, standard for modern infantry.
    AUTOMATIC - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FireMode
    Continuously fires rounds as long as the trigger is held down.
    AUTOMATIC_RIFLE - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    Rifles capable of fully automatic fire, often used in military contexts.

    B

    BATTLE_RIFLE - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    Powerful rifles designed for intermediate range, often with select-fire capabilities.
    build() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoData.Builder
    Builds a new AmmoData object with the values set in this builder.
    build() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Builds a new FirearmStats object with the values set in this builder.
    build(UICommandBuilder) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.ui.AimHUD
    Builds the UI elements for the aiming HUD.
    build(UICommandBuilder) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.ui.EmptyHUD
    Builds the UI elements for the HUD.
    builder() - Static method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoData
    Creates a new AmmoData.Builder instance for constructing an AmmoData object.
    builder() - Static method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Creates a new FirearmStats.Builder instance for constructing a FirearmStats object.
    BURST - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FireMode
    Fires a fixed number of rounds (usually 2 or 3) per trigger pull.

    C

    calibre() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoData
    Returns the value of the calibre record component.
    calibre() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the calibre record component.
    calibre(String) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoData.Builder
    Sets the calibre of the ammunition.
    calibre(String) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the calibre of the ammunition used by the firearm.
    CheckCooldownInteraction - Class in lucis.lux.hff.interactions
    The CheckCooldownInteraction class is a SimpleInstantInteraction responsible for checking whether a firearm is currently on cooldown.
    CheckCooldownInteraction() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.interactions.CheckCooldownInteraction
     
    clone() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.components.AimComponent
    Creates and returns a copy of this component.
    clone() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.components.ReloadingComponent
    Creates a copy of this component.
    CODEC - Static variable in class lucis.lux.hff.components.AimComponent
    The BuilderCodec for serializing and deserializing the AimComponent.
    CODEC - Static variable in class lucis.lux.hff.components.ReloadingComponent
    The BuilderCodec for serializing and deserializing this component.
    CODEC - Static variable in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmState
    The BuilderCodec for serializing and deserializing this class.
    CODEC - Static variable in class lucis.lux.hff.interactions.CheckCooldownInteraction
    The BuilderCodec for serializing and deserializing the CheckCooldownInteraction.S
    CODEC - Static variable in class lucis.lux.hff.interactions.ReloadInteraction
    The BuilderCodec for serializing and deserializing this interaction.
    CODEC - Static variable in class lucis.lux.hff.interactions.ShootFirearmInteraction
    The BuilderCodec for serializing and deserializing this interaction.
    CODEC - Static variable in class lucis.lux.hff.interactions.ToggleAimInteraction
    The BuilderCodec for serializing and deserializing this interaction.
    ConfigManager - Class in lucis.lux.hff.data
    The ConfigManager class is responsible for loading and managing configuration settings for the HFF (Hytale Firearm Framework) plugin.
    ConfigManager() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.data.ConfigManager
     
    consumeNextProjectile() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmState
    Consumes the next projectile from the firearm.

    D

    damage() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoData
    Returns the value of the damage record component.
    damage(float) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoData.Builder
    Sets the damage value of the ammunition.
    data() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.events.OnCheckTimeout
    Returns the value of the data record component.
    data() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.events.OnShoot
    Returns the value of the data record component.
    disabled() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the disabled record component.
    disabled(boolean) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets whether the HFF mechanics are disabled.
    DOUBLE_ACTION - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FireMode
    Cocks and fires the weapon with a single trigger pull (e.g., double-action revolvers).

    E

    EARLY_GUNPOWDER - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmClass
    Early firearms that utilized gunpowder in a primitive form.
    EmptyHUD - Class in lucis.lux.hff.ui
    The EmptyHUD class is a utility class designed to hide custom HUDs (Heads-Up Displays) by replacing them with an empty HUD.
    EmptyHUD(PlayerRef) - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.ui.EmptyHUD
    Constructs a new EmptyHUD for the specified player.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoData
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.events.OnCheckTimeout
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.events.OnShoot
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    execute(CommandContext, Store, Ref, PlayerRef, World) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.commands.ShowUUIDCommand
    Executes the command, displaying the UUID and registration status of the currently held weapon.
    executeAsync(CommandContext) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.commands.ShowFirearmRegistryCommand
    Executes the command asynchronously, sending a list of all registered firearms to the command context.
    executeAsync(CommandContext) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.commands.ShowProjectilesCommand
    Executes the command asynchronously, sending a list of all registered projectiles to the command context.

    F

    FirearmAttachment - Interface in lucis.lux.hff.components.interfaces
     
    firearmClass() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the firearmClass record component.
    firearmClass(FirearmClass) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the historical and mechanical classification of the firearm.
    FirearmClass - Enum Class in lucis.lux.hff.enums
    The FirearmClass enum represents the historical classification of firearms based on their technological era and mechanism.
    FirearmRegistry - Class in lucis.lux.hff.data
    The FirearmRegistry class serves ass a central registry for managing and retrieving firearm statistics associated with specific itemIds.
    FirearmRegistry() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmRegistry
     
    FirearmState - Class in lucis.lux.hff.data
    The FirearmState class is used to track the operational state of a firearm, such as the number of loaded projectiles.
    FirearmState() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmState
    Constructs a new FirearmState with an empty list of loaded projectiles.
    FirearmStateManager - Class in lucis.lux.hff.data
    The FirearmStateManager class serves as a central manager for tracking and managing the state of firearms in the HFF (Hytale Firearm Framework) plugin.
    FirearmStateManager() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStateManager
     
    FirearmStateStorage - Class in lucis.lux.hff.storage
    The FirearmStateStorage class is responsible for saving and loading the state of firearms to and from a file.
    FirearmStateStorage() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.storage.FirearmStateStorage
     
    FirearmStats - Record Class in lucis.lux.hff.data
    The FirearmStats record represents the statistics and properties of a firearm.
    FirearmStats(float, float, float, int, int, float, float, float, float, float, float, FirearmClass, FirearmType, FireMode, boolean, String) - Constructor for record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Creates an instance of a FirearmStats record class.
    FirearmStats.Builder - Class in lucis.lux.hff.data
    The Builder class provides a fluent interface for constructing FirearmStats objects.
    firearmType() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the firearmType record component.
    firearmType(FirearmType) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the functional type of the firearm.
    FirearmType - Enum Class in lucis.lux.hff.enums
    The FirearmType enum categorizes firearms into distinct types based on their design, function, and role.
    FirearmUuidInitializer - Class in lucis.lux.hff.listeners
    The FirearmUuidInitializer class is responsible for initializing and managing UUIDs for firearms in a player's inventory.
    FirearmUuidInitializer() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.listeners.FirearmUuidInitializer
     
    fireMode() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the fireMode record component.
    fireMode(FireMode) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the firing mode of the firearm.
    FireMode - Enum Class in lucis.lux.hff.enums
    The FireMode enum defines the different firing modes available for firearms.
    firstRun(InteractionType, InteractionContext, CooldownHandler) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.interactions.CheckCooldownInteraction
    Executes the cooldown check logic for the firearm.
    firstRun(InteractionType, InteractionContext, CooldownHandler) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.interactions.ReloadInteraction
    Called when the interaction is first run.
    firstRun(InteractionType, InteractionContext, CooldownHandler) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.interactions.ShootFirearmInteraction
    Called when the interaction is first run.
    firstRun(InteractionType, InteractionContext, CooldownHandler) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.interactions.ToggleAimInteraction
    Called when the interaction is first run.
    FLINTLOCK - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmClass
    Firearms using a flintlock ignition mechanism.

    G

    generateAssetPack(String, String) - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.HFFAssetPackGenerator
    Generates an asset pack by scanning the specified directories for JAR and ZIP files containing assets.
    get() - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.HFF
    Returns the singleton instance of the HFF plugin.
    get(String) - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoRegistry
    Retrieves the ammunition data associated with a specific item ID.
    get(String) - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmRegistry
    Retrieves the firearm statistics associated with a specific item ID.
    getAimComponentType() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.HFF
    Returns the component type for aiming mechanics.
    getArchivePath() - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.ConfigManager
    Returns the current archive path for configurations.
    getCooldown() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Calculates the cooldown time between shots in seconds.
    getCurrentAmmoCount() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmState
    Returns the current number of loaded projectiles in the firearm.
    getDamageMult() - Method in interface lucis.lux.hff.components.interfaces.FirearmAttachment
     
    getFilePath() - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.ConfigManager
    Returns the current file path for configurations.
    getList() - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoRegistry
    Returns a map of all registered ammunition data.
    getList() - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmRegistry
    Returns a map of all registered firearm statistics.
    getPathInArchive() - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.ConfigManager
    Returns the current path inside archives for configurations.
    getQuery() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.systems.AimSystem
    Defines the query for this system, specifying that it should process entities that have an AimComponent.
    getQuery() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.systems.ReloadSystem
    Defines the query for selecting entities to tick.
    getRecoilMult() - Method in interface lucis.lux.hff.components.interfaces.FirearmAttachment
     
    getReloadingComponentType() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.HFF
     
    getSpreadMult() - Method in interface lucis.lux.hff.components.interfaces.FirearmAttachment
     
    getState(UUID) - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStateManager
    Retrieves the state of a firearm by its unique UUID.
    getStateMap() - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStateManager
    Returns a copy of the entire state map.
    GP_MACHINE_GUN - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    General-purpose machine guns, versatile for both infantry and vehicle roles.
    GRENADE_LAUNCHER - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    Firearms that launch explosive grenades, effective for indirect fire or area denial.

    H

    HANDGUN - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    Small, portable firearms designed for one-handed use, such as pistols.
    hashCode() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoData
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.events.OnCheckTimeout
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.events.OnShoot
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    HFF - Class in lucis.lux.hff
    The HFF class is the main plugin class for the Hytale Firearm Framework (HFF) plugin.
    HFF(JavaPluginInit) - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.HFF
    Constructs a new instance of the HFF plugin.
    HFFAssetPackGenerator - Class in lucis.lux.hff.data
    The HFFAssetPackGenerator class is responsible for generating asset packs for the HFF (Hytale Firearm Framework) plugin.
    HFFAssetPackGenerator() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.data.HFFAssetPackGenerator
     
    horizontalRecoil() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the horizontalRecoil record component.
    horizontalRecoil(float) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the horizontal recoil strength.

    I

    isAiming() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.components.AimComponent
    Returns wheter the entity is currently aiming.
    isArchiveFirst() - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.ConfigManager
    Returns whether archives should be checked first for configuration.
    isDebugMode() - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.ConfigManager
    Returns whether debug mode is enabled.
    isReloading() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.components.ReloadingComponent
    Returns whether the firearm is currently reloading.

    J

    jamChance() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the jamChance record component.
    jamChance(float) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the chance of the firearm jamming.

    L

    LIGHT_MACHINE_GUN - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    Lightweight machine guns designed for mobility and sustained fire.
    loadConfig() - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.ConfigManager
    Loads the configuration from available sources.
    loadProjectile(String) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmState
    Loads a projectile into the firearm.
    loadStates() - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.storage.FirearmStateStorage
    Loads the state of all firearms from the file.
    LONG_GUN - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    A general category for long-barrelled firearms, such as rifles and muskets.

    M

    MACHINE_PISTOL - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    Compact, fully automatic handguns, often used for close-quarters combat.
    MANUAL - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FireMode
    Requires manual operation for each shot (e.g., muskets or break-action shotguns).
    MARKSMAN_RIFLE - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    Precision rifles designed for accurate long-range fire, often semi-automatic.
    MATCHLOCK - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmClass
    Firearms using a matchlock ignition mechanism.
    misfireChance() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the misfireChance record component.
    misfireChance(float) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the chance of the firearm misfiring.
    MODERN - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmClass
    Modern firearms, typically using cartridge-based ammunition.
    movementPenalty() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the movementPenalty record component.
    movementPenalty(float) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the penalty to accuracy when moving.

    O

    OnCheckTimeout - Record Class in lucis.lux.hff.events
     
    OnCheckTimeout(String) - Constructor for record class lucis.lux.hff.events.OnCheckTimeout
    Creates an instance of a OnCheckTimeout record class.
    onInventoryChanged(LivingEntityInventoryChangeEvent) - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.listeners.FirearmUuidInitializer
    Called when an inventory change event is detected.
    OnShoot - Record Class in lucis.lux.hff.events
     
    OnShoot(String) - Constructor for record class lucis.lux.hff.events.OnShoot
    Creates an instance of a OnShoot record class.
    OTHER - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmClass
    Firearms or projectile weapons that do not fit into the above categories.
    OTHER - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    Firearms or projectile weapons that do not fit into the above categories.
    OTHER - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FireMode
    Fire modes that do not fit into the above categories, such as experimental or custom designs.

    P

    PERCUSSION_CAP - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmClass
    Firearms using percussion caps for ignition.
    PRE_GUNPOWDER - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmClass
    Pre-gunpowder projectile weapons, such as crossbows.
    projectileAmount() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the projectileAmount record component.
    projectileAmount(int) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the number of projectiles fired per shot.
    projectileCapacity() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the projectileCapacity record component.
    projectileCapacity(int) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the maximum number of projectiles the firearm can hold.
    projectileId() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoData
    Returns the value of the projectileId record component.
    projectileId(String) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoData.Builder
    Sets the ID of the projectile associated with the ammunition.
    projectileVelocity() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the projectileVelocity record component.
    projectileVelocity(float) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the velocity of the projectile when fired.

    R

    register(String, AmmoData) - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoRegistry
    Registers ammunition data for a specific item ID.
    register(String, FirearmStats) - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmRegistry
    Registers firearm statistics for a specific item ID.
    registerState(UUID, FirearmState) - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStateManager
    Registers a new firearm state in the manager.
    ReloadingComponent - Class in lucis.lux.hff.components
    The ReloadingComponent class is a component that represents the reloading state of a firearm.
    ReloadingComponent() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.components.ReloadingComponent
    Constructs a new ReloadingComponent with the default reloading state set to false.
    ReloadingComponent(boolean) - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.components.ReloadingComponent
    Constructs a new ReloadingComponent with the specified reloading state.
    ReloadingComponent(ReloadingComponent) - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.components.ReloadingComponent
    Constructs a new ReloadingComponent by copying the state from another component.
    ReloadInteraction - Class in lucis.lux.hff.interactions
    The ReloadInteraction class is a SimpleInstantInteraction responsible for handling the reload mechanism of firearms in the game.
    ReloadInteraction() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.interactions.ReloadInteraction
     
    ReloadSystem - Class in lucis.lux.hff.systems
    The ReloadSystem class is an EntityTickingSystem responsible for monitoring and managing the reloading process of a firearm in real-time.
    ReloadSystem(ComponentType) - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.systems.ReloadSystem
    Constructs a new ReloadSystem with the specified component type for ammunition.
    reloadTime() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the reloadTime record component.
    reloadTime(float) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the time in seconds required to reload the firearm.
    REVOLVER - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    Handguns with a revolving cylinder containing multiple chambers for ammunition.
    ROCKET_LAUNCHER - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    Weapons designed to launch explosive rockets, used against vehicles or fortifications.
    rpm() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the rpm record component.
    rpm(float) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the rounds per minute (rate of fire).

    S

    saveStates() - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.storage.FirearmStateStorage
    Saves the current state of all firearms to the file.
    SELECT_FIRE - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FireMode
    Allows switching between different firing modes (e.g., semi-automatic and automatic).
    SEMI_AUTOMATIC - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FireMode
    Fires one round per trigger pull, automatically chambering the next round.
    setAiming(boolean) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.components.AimComponent
    Sets the aiming state of the entity.
    setReloading(boolean) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.components.ReloadingComponent
    Sets the reloading state of the firearm.
    setup() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.HFF
    Sets up the plugin by registering components, systems, and interactions.
    ShootFirearmInteraction - Class in lucis.lux.hff.interactions
    The ShootFirearmInteraction class is a SimpleInstantInteraction responsible for handling the shooting mechanism of firearms in the game.
    ShootFirearmInteraction() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.interactions.ShootFirearmInteraction
     
    SHOTGUN - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    Firearms that fire a spread of small pellets or a single slug, effective at short range.
    ShowFirearmRegistryCommand - Class in lucis.lux.hff.commands
    The ShowFirearmRegistryCommand class is an asynchronous command that displays a list of all registered firearms in the game.
    ShowFirearmRegistryCommand() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.commands.ShowFirearmRegistryCommand
    Constructs a new ShowFirearmRegistryCommand with the specified command name and description.
    ShowProjectilesCommand - Class in lucis.lux.hff.commands
    The ShowProjectilesCommand class is an asynchronous command that displays a list of all registered projectiles in the game.
    ShowProjectilesCommand() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.commands.ShowProjectilesCommand
    Constructs a new ShowProjectilesCommand with the specified command name and description.
    ShowUUIDCommand - Class in lucis.lux.hff.commands
    The ShowUUIDCommand class is a player command that displays the UUID of the currently held weapon.
    ShowUUIDCommand() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.commands.ShowUUIDCommand
    Constructs a new ShowUUIDCommand with the specified command name, description, and usage restrictions.
    shutdown() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.HFF
    Called when the plugin is shut down.
    SINGLE_ACTION - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FireMode
    Requires the hammer to be manually cocked before each shot (e.g., single-action revolvers).
    SINGLE_SHOT - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FireMode
    Fires one round per trigger pull, requiring manual action to chamber the next round (e.g., bolt-action rifles).
    SNIPER_RIFLE - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    High-precision rifles optimized for extreme range and accuracy, typically bolt-action.
    spreadBase() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns the value of the spreadBase record component.
    spreadBase(float) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the base spread of projectiles (in degrees).
    start() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.HFF
    Called when the plugin is started.
    SUBMACHINE_GUN - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmType
    Lightweight, automatic firearms chambered for pistol-calibre ammunition.

    T

    tick(float, int, ArchetypeChunk, Store, CommandBuffer) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.systems.AimSystem
    Ticks the system, updating the camera settings for all entities with an AimComponent.
    tick(float, int, ArchetypeChunk, Store, CommandBuffer) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.systems.ReloadSystem
    Ticks the system for each entity with a ReloadingComponent.
    toBuilder() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.AmmoData
    Creates a new AmmoData.Builder instance initialized with the values of this AmmoData object.
    toBuilder() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Creates a new FirearmStats.Builder instance initialized with the values of this FirearmStats object.
    ToggleAimInteraction - Class in lucis.lux.hff.interactions
    The ToggleAimInteraction class is a SimpleInstantInteraction responsible for toggling the aiming mode of a player's firearm.
    ToggleAimInteraction() - Constructor for class lucis.lux.hff.interactions.ToggleAimInteraction
     
    toggleReloading() - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.components.ReloadingComponent
    Toggles the reloading state of the firearm.

    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.events.OnCheckTimeout
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class lucis.lux.hff.events.OnShoot
    Returns a string representation of this record class.

    updateState(UUID, FirearmState) - Static method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStateManager
    Updates the state of a firearm in the manager.

    Returns the value of the verticalRecoil record component.
    verticalRecoil(float) - Method in class lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats.Builder
    Sets the vertical recoil strength.

    W

    WHEELLOCK - Enum constant in enum class lucis.lux.hff.enums.FirearmClass
    Firearms using a wheellock ignition mechanism.
